description: Machine-readable source + license inventory for the sources spot uses or plans to use. Each entry's license was checked against the source's official page on the verification date; entries whose license could not be verified are omitted. Usage_status is honest about the current implementation state (Stages 3-4 not yet implemented in this repo).
spdx_note: license.id uses SPDX identifiers where one exists; scope_note records any per-component license split.

sources.name: Marson genome-scale CD4 perturb-seq (CZI Virtual Cells Platform)
sources.redistribution_target: Hugging Face KiritSingh/spot-CD4-Marson (derived NTC-subset embedding only)

license.scope_note: upstream CZI dataset license; spot redistributes only a derived subset under MIT

sources.attribution: Zhu, Dann, ... Marson 2025; bioRxiv doi:10.64898/2025.12.23.696273; CZI Virtual Cells Platform Acceptable Use Policy applies
sources.redistribution_terms: MIT with attribution; no raw source matrix bundled

sources.name: Gene Ontology (GO)

license.scope_note: GO Consortium data and data products

license_verified.official_quote: Gene Ontology Consortium data and data products are licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 Unported License.

sources.attribution: Gene Ontology Consortium + release date + Zenodo DOI

sources.name: Reactome pathway database

license.scope_note: annotation + interaction data derived from Reactome are CC0; Reactome software/code, data dumps, and pathway illustrations are CC BY 4.0

license_verified.official_quote: annotation files and interaction data derived from Reactome are distributed under a Creative Commons Public Domain (CC0 1.0 Universal) Licence

sources.attribution: Reactome (attribution encouraged, not required for CC0 annotation data)
sources.redistribution_terms: CC0 for annotation/interaction data; CC BY 4.0 for software/diagrams

sources.name: ChEMBL (EMBL-EBI)

license.scope_note: Unported; share-alike applies only if derived ChEMBL data is redistributed

license_verified.official_quote: Creative Commons Attribution-Share Alike 3.0 Unported License

sources.redistribution_terms: CC BY-SA 3.0 attribution + share-alike on redistributed derivatives

license.scope_note: all copyrightable parts of the databases

license_verified.official_quote: We have chosen to apply the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0) License to all copyrightable parts of our databases.

sources.name: PubChem (NCBI / NLM)

license.scope_note: NCBI places no restrictions on NCBI-created content (US public domain); depositor-contributed content may be protected by copyright and carries the submitter's terms

license_verified.official_quote: NCBI itself places no restrictions on the use or distribution of the data contained therein. ... Some submitters of the original data ... may claim patent, copyright, or other intellectual property rights.

sources.attribution: NCBI/NLM PubChem; adhere to individual submitter terms where asserted
sources.redistribution_terms: NCBI content unrestricted; verify submitter terms before redistributing depositor content

license.scope_note: openFDA data dedication; do not imply FDA endorsement; GMDN content needs a separate license for some uses

license_verified.official_quote: public domain and made available with a Creative Commons CC0 1.0 Universal dedication

sources.name: DailyMed (NLM)

license.scope_note: NLM-produced content is US-government public domain; manufacturer-submitted label (SPL) content may carry third-party restrictions

license_verified.official_quote: Works produced by the U.S. government are not subject to copyright protection in the United States. ... It is your responsibility to determine and satisfy copyright or other use restrictions when using materials that are not in the public domain.

sources.attribution: Courtesy of the National Library of Medicine (NLM requests this phrasing)
sources.redistribution_terms: NLM-produced content freely reusable; verify third-party label content

sources.name: Grossman et al., Neuro-Oncology 2026 (NEBPI brain-penetrance framework)
sources.redistribution_terms: cite; publisher OA license not re-verified this pass

sources.name: Masopust et al., Nat Rev Immunol 2026 (T-cell nomenclature)

license.scope_note: reference framework for Stage-1 program naming only; gene panels are spot's own curation

sources.attribution: Masopust et al., Nat Rev Immunol 2026; doi:10.1038/s41577-025-01238-2
sources.redistribution_terms: cite; publisher OA license not re-verified this pass

omitted_unverified.note: No source in this pass was left with an asserted-but-unverified license. Sources outside the curated list above (e.g. DepMap, Open Targets, LINCS, DrugBank, SIDER, DrugComb) are recorded in DATA_LICENSES.md with their usage bucket and are not re-asserted here.
